rich_text_FBnpDT.name: Guide To Hoop Earrings Styles & Sizes

settings.content: Ultimate Guide To Hoop Earrings Styles & Sizes

Hoop Earrings are a go-to accessory for nearly every style and occasion. Their effortless versatility often makes them the obvious choice, but that can also make them feel repetitive. So, how can you switch up your hoop earring styles and sizes to elevate your look and keep things fresh for different outfits and events? This guide covers the various styles of hoops that you can opt for, how size matters, how to choose hoop earrings based on face shape and hairstyle, and occasion-based styling tips.

Classic Round Hoops 

The classic round hoops are a jewelry box essential. They can look fun on casual denim outings and sleek with your power suits.

settings.text: Huggies, earrings that are a hug to your ears, are the most understated type of Hoop Earrings. They look small, covering your earlobe, but have a big impact. They complement layered looks.  If you have multiple ear piercings without looking too heavy and subtly radiate elegance. They also look perfect if you want to draw more focus on a statement necklace that you are wearing or want to give a dainty look by wearing Lab Grown Diamond Huggies.

settings.content:
Twisted or Textured Hoops 

These hoops are a twist to the classic round hoops with braided, hammered or rope-like designs that add a new edge to the otherwise classic look of a hoop.

settings.text: These contemporary hoops come in different shapes, such as hexagon, oval, and square. Nowadays, you can choose Round Hoops with geometrically shaped diamonds such as Lucira’s Bezel Set Hexagon Diamond Earrings. These are carefully curated with precision, giving a unique, eye-catching look for the woman who rises and moves with intention.

settings.content:
Statement Hoops 

For those who wish to stand out in the crowd and make a statement, statement hoops are the best choice! They tend to be on the larger side giving a bold look. These look fantastic on casual outings but aren’t preferred in formal setups

settings.text: Go beyond the ordinary and create something that is truly yours. By customising your Hoop Earrings to your style, you can bring your idea to life. Customized Hoop Earrings are also a perfect gift. With engravings, birthstones and different gemstones, you can customize these earrings any way you like!

settings.content: Start with the metal you love, maybe 18-carat warm gold. Then, make it personal: think hidden initials etched within and a birthstone that’s thoughtfully shaped to reflect your story.

rich_text_8ekKze.name: Which Size Hoop Earrings to Wear: Based on Face Shape, Hairstyles and Occasions?

settings.content:
Which Size Hoop Earrings to Wear: Based on Face Shape, Hairstyles and Occasions?

The size of your Hoop Earrings matter a lot, they can change your look entirely! Here’s how to choose the right size of Hoop Earrings to flatter your features, enhance your look and match the vibe of the moment!

Huggies

Huggies are best for every occasion and style. They are minimal, elegant, and easy to carry. They are effortlessly chic and the ultimate jewelry for multiple piercing.A pair of diamond huggies is the best option for people with multiple piercings. Choose these if you have a short or a pixie hair cut because even though these hoops are small, they make a statement.

Small Hoops

Small Hoops are the go-to jewelry choice for people with petite face. Small hoops are perfect from daytime to nighttime, from office meetings to casual outings. Wear these hoops with tucked-back straight hair to create a balanced look with bold and powerful hair styles.

Medium Hoops

Medium Hoops are universally flattering for all face shapes. They give a balanced glam, not too tiny that they get hidden, and not too bold. If you have wavy or loose curls, wear medium hoops as smaller hoops tend to get hidden in the hair. Thicker hoops with diamonds stand out and add dimension to your look.

Large Hoops

These hoops are perfect for open, voluminous hairstyles and even hair up-dos. They complete the look when heading for a party! If you have curly and voluminous hair, go for these statement hoops. Big hair deserves big energy! If you have braided your hair, you can go for medium or large hoops.

rich_text_tfewdc.name: How To Pair Your Hoop Earrings with Our Lab Rings and Pendants

settings.content: How To Pair Your Hoop Earrings with Our Lab Rings and Pendants

settings.text: Hoop Earrings, by themselves, are a classic but styling them properly can make all the difference! For instance, if you’re going for big, bold hoop earrings, balance them with minimal necklaces. On the other hand, if you’re wearing huggies, feel free to layer up your Necklaces or add an extra edge of power and beauty, with Studs and Ear Cuffs. Styling is an art that helps you express your personality, so don’t fear to mix up some styles and metals. If you’re wearing Rose Gold Hoop Earrings, you can pair it with our Lab Grown Chain Pendant and a Cuff Bracelet. This way, the Rose Gold Hoops and Bracelets will match, and the diamonds on top will give the extra sparkle that you deserve. Just ensure that the look is cohesive with these tones belonging to the same warm-toned family. This combination won’t be jarring, just the perfect contrast hinting at modernity and richness.

rich_text_a4WArR.name: How To Care For Your Hoop Earrings

settings.content: How To Care For Your Hoop Earrings

settings.text: Hoop Earrings made in fine jewelry are made out of gold and platinum with gemstones and diamonds. They need your extra care to keep their versatility and effortlessly eye-catching look. To care for your Hoop Earrings, store them in the original packaging or a soft lined pouch. This will avoid scratching. Do not store them along with necklaces or other dangling earrings to avoid tangling. Wipe them occasionally with a soft lint-free cloth. Get the earrings polished from your jeweler once every year to keep the shine as-good-as-new.

settings.content: At Lucira, we design hoop earrings with precision and intricate details. We redefine brilliance and help you enter a loop of luxury.
